paragraphs.text: Is the minute of the most holy bishop Cyril, delivered to Posidonius, when sent by him to Rome, in the matter of Nestorius. (Cyrill. Ep. XI. tom. lxxvii. 85.)
paragraphs.html: Is <q>the minute of the most holy bishop Cyril, delivered to Posidonius, when sent by him to Rome, in the matter of Nestorius.</q> (Cyrill. Ep. XI. tom. lxxvii. 85.)
